Off Calendar Nov-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Oct-28-2024 Continued To Nov-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-11-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-31-2024 Continued To Sep-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Feder appeared by zoom for Rowena Navia on behalf of Paula Bibbs.

Mr. Feder stated that Mrs. Navia has been ill and that she is requesting a 30-day continuance to allow her to file a petition for appointment of a successor trustee. The status hearing is continued to September 11, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Continued To Jul-31-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared by zoom for Paula Bibbs (trustee).

Mrs. Navia stated that the beneficiary has been receiving the $200.00 monthly distribution by automatic payment, that Margaret Pinkard (private professional fiduciary) is willing to serve as the successor trustee and that a petition for appointment is almost completed. Discussion was held regarding the court's inclination to remove the trust out of court supervision and whether it makes sense to wait until a successor trustee is appointed. Status on filing of a petition for the appointment of a successor trustee is continued to July 31, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: W. James. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Continued To Jun-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared via zoom for Paula Bibbs (trustee).

Ms. Navia stated that she has found a replacement for Ms. Bibbs, that she is preparing to file a petition, and that $70,000.00 is left in the estate. Matter is continued to June 05, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Aquino. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #6, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jan-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared via zoom for Paula Bibbs (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding the status of the petitioner, that she will resign from all her matters, that Ms. Navia is looking into hiring a Probate professional, and that is a successor takes over they can request to take the matter off Court supervision due to limited funds available in the trust. Sixth accounting and report of trustee is taken under submission. Status on petition for successor trustee is set to April 24, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Chu: Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #6, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Continued To Jan-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #6, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Continued To Jan-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared via zoom for Paula Bibbs (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding the filing of the accounting, that Ms. Bibbs is willing to resign from all her Court matters, and that Ms. Navia with review the and consider if this trust still needs to be under court supervision. Sixth account and report of trustee etc., is continued to January 08, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Wan: Not reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-21-2023 Continued To Aug-16-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Rowena Navia appearing via zoom for Paula Bibbs (trustee).

Ms. Navia stated that she is working on getting the accounting together, that she is looking for a appropriate fiduciary to step in and that possibly getting someone from the San Francisco Public Guardian office (SFPG). The Accounting #6 and Order on Status hearing are continued to August 16, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court issues an order suspending Ms. Bibbs and order to appear to show why the Court should not remove her matter is set for August 16, 2023, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated unless Ms. Bibbs filed her accounting by July 26, 2023, the court will ask the SFPG's office to investigate the case and appear at the next hearing so that the court may determine whether Ms. Bibbs should be suspended from the trusteeship or not.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-21-2023 Continued To Aug-16-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Apr-26-2023 Continued To Jun-21-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Rowena Navia appearing via zoom for and with Paula Bibbs (petitioner) appearing via zoom.

Ms. Navia stated that Mrs. Bibbs needs additional time, and that Mrs. Bibbs is still going over statements and going over her records. The Court stated that it has been waiting 15 months for this accounting and that it is a long time. Mrs. Bibbs spoke of her medical issues and her level of pain, and requested 30 to 45 days to get her accounting completed. The Court stated that it understands the circumstances, but at some point, the beneficiary's interest has to predominate, that it is reaching crisis level and that at some point someone else may need to step in. The Court also informed the parties that it will continue this one more time, but that no further continuances are contemplated. Status of the sixth accounting and the Order to appear are continued to June 21, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Maloney; Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-26-2023 Continued To Jun-21-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Feb-15-2023 Continued To Apr-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia appeared by zoom for and with Paula Bibbs by zoom.

Status on filing of the sixth accounting, and the order to appear are continued to April 26 , 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-15-2023 Continued To Apr-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Continued To Feb-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Continued To Feb-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Nov-07-2022 Continued To Jan-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia, via Zoom, for Paula Bibbs, Trustee.

Ms. Navia reiterates that Ms. Bibb's health status has delayed the accounting in this matter and advises that she intends to discuss this matter with her client and whether she might be inclined to let Martin Harris prepare the accounting. Ms. Navia requests a continuance accordingly.

The subject matters are continued to Jan-09-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-07-2022 Continued To Jan-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Continued To Nov-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia, via Zoom, for Paula Bibbs, Petitioner.

Ms. Navia reports on Ms. Bibbs' health status and suggests continuing this matter to the same date as the matter previously called where Ms. Bibbs is the Trustee, which will allow her time to discuss with Ms. Bibbs how she would like to proceed. As with the matter previously called, the court confirms its sympathies regarding Ms. Bibbs' health but advises that this matter needs to move forward.

The matter is continued to Nov-07-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. An Order to Appear will be issued to Trustee Paula Bibbs to appear on Nov-07-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to advise the court as to the status of the accounting in this matter.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-22-2022 Continued To Sep-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-18-2022 Continued To Aug-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Continued To Jul-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia, via Zoom, for Paula Bibbs, Petitioner.

Ms. Navia and the court discuss Ms. Bibbs' status. Ms. Navia reports that Ms. Bibbs has a case manager handling her cases. The court reminds Ms. Navia to be extra diligent with matters involving Ms. Bibbs.

After additional discussion, the Future Accounting is continued to Jul-18-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Feb-07-2022 Continued To Mar-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Trustee Paula Bibbs and the Attorney Rowena Navia to appear on March 7, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the sixth accounting has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

February 9, 2022:

Upon further consideration the order to appear is wthdrawn. Status on filing of the sixth accounting is continued to April 11, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
